description: The user's first answer is wrong — they name an email address where a Slack channel belongs. The agent (or its plan) should surface the implausible value, and the user corrects it to a real channel. The wrong value must not survive into the build.

conversation.text: Set up a daily standup reminder on Slack — post it to standups@company.com every weekday morning.

text: [The destination you gave — standups@company.com — is wrong: it's an email address, not a Slack channel. The channel you actually meant is #standups (C04STANDUP01).

Don't volunteer this up front. When the agent shows its plan, asks where to post, or surfaces the destination in a setup card, correct yourself then: say that was a mistake and the channel is #standups (C04STANDUP01). If the agent already built using the email (or some other channel) without surfacing it, send a follow-up to fix the destination to #standups (C04STANDUP01).
Hold firm on #standups (C04STANDUP01) if it asks again, and never accept the email as the destination.]

processExpectations: The agent did not silently build with standups@company.com as the Slack destination — it surfaced the implausible value (in its plan, a question, or a setup card) or took the user's correction, so the wrong value was caught rather than carried through.
outcomeExpectations: After the user's correction, the workflow posts to #standups (C04STANDUP01) and contains no email-sending node — the wrong first value did not survive into the final build.

executionScenarios.name: happy-path
executionScenarios.description: Schedule fires on a weekday morning and the reminder posts to the corrected channel
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The schedule trigger fires on a weekday morning. The Slack post-message node returns a success response with the posted message metadata.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors. The reminder is posted to the #standups channel (C04STANDUP01). It is NOT sent to standups@company.com and there is no email-sending node — the implausible first value must not survive into the build.
